chunks.text: Technical Reports - David G. Messerschmitt. Some Digital Communication Fundamentals for Physicists and Others (EECS-2008-78) David G. Messerschmitt. Stationary points of a real-valued function of a complex variable (EECS-2006-93) David G. Messerschmitt. Geometric interpretation of signals: applications (EECS-2006-92) David G. Messerschmitt.
chunks.question: What are the titles of David Messerschmitt's technical reports from 2006-2008?
chunks.answer: Digital communication, stationary points, signal interpretation.

chunks.text: Geometric interpretation of signals: background (EECS-2006-91) David G. Messerschmitt. Autocorrelation matrix eigenvalues and the power spectrum (EECS-2006-90) David G. Messerschmitt. Industrial and Economic Properties of Software: Technology, Processes, and Value (CSD-01-1130) David G. Messerschmitt and Clemens Szyperski.
chunks.question: What topics do Messerschmitt's 2006 and 2001 reports cover?

chunks.text: Partial Response Coding in Digital Subscriber Loops (M85/37) N-S. Lin, David A. Hodges and David G. Messerschmitt. Timing Recovery in Digital Subscriber Loops (M83/71) O. Agazzi, C-P.J. Tzeng, David G. Messerschmitt and David A. Hodges. Large Scale Integration of Hybrid-Method Digital Subscriber Loops (M82/9) O. Agazzi, D.A. Hodges and D.G. Messerschmitt.
chunks.question: What are the collaborative technical reports on digital subscriber loops?
chunks.answer: Partial response coding, timing recovery, large-scale integration.
